name: traveler-experience-lab
description: MyRealTrip PE wedge for grounding traveler-experience work in real-time MRT inventory and de-identified VoC.

interface.shortDescription: Ground MRT travel scenarios in live inventory and VoC.
interface.longDescription: Traveler Experience Lab helps Product Engineers turn traveler experience problems into grounded scenarios, experiment briefs, and QA drafts using MyRealTrip's public MCP inventory tools and de-identified VoC summaries.
defaultPrompt: Run /mrt scenario for an Osaka family trip.
Create a travel scenario with flight, stay, and TNA.
